model Schedule Study groups Links Tasks The Caltrop Project The Caltrop Project is part of the Ptolemy Project (cf. also its Gigascale page ). Its research focuses on the definition of CAL , a textual notation for writing data

of CAL , a textual notation for writing dataflow actors, and uses and applications of that language inside and outside of Ptolemy and the Ptolemy II software. Additional info: May 5, 2008: Artist2 - ACTORS workshop on DataFlow Modeling for
